scripts.prepare:assets: npm run prepare:engine && npm run prepare:freedoom && npm run prepare:maps
scripts.smoke: npm run smoke:browser && npm run smoke:room
scripts.deploy: npm run prepare:assets && npm run verify && wrangler deploy

DOOM_KEY.description: Room-signing secret. Keep the generated value unless you want to replace it with your own random secret.

ROOMS.description: Durable Object namespace for live game rooms. Cloudflare provisions this from `wrangler.jsonc`.
